seo.description: At CarMitsu, our specialty is not just cars – it’s the passion and dedication we put into every Mitsubishi, Hyundai, and Toyota we service. We are an independent workshop proud to provide comprehensive care for your vehicle, combining years of experience with modern technology.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Read our privacy policy to learn what data we collect and how we process it.

realizations.title: Our Realizations
realizations.description: See our achievements and discover why it's worth trusting CarMitsu with servicing your Mitsubishi.

about.title: Specialized Service for Mitsubishi, Hyundai and Toyota Vehicles
description: CarMitsu is an automotive company with many years of experience, specializing in the repair and maintenance of Mitsubishi, Hyundai, and Toyota vehicles.

Our story began with a passion for legendary off-road cars – the Mitsubishi Pajero, L200, and Hyundai Galloper. Over time, that passion evolved into a professional service center that now provides top-quality maintenance and repair services for a wide range of Mitsubishi, Hyundai, and Toyota models.

At CarMitsu, we understand that your car – whether it’s a Mitsubishi, Hyundai, or Toyota – is more than just a means of transport. It’s a part of your lifestyle. As an independent specialist workshop, we offer a full range of mechanical, diagnostic, and maintenance services to ensure your vehicle is always in perfect condition and ready for any adventure.

whyUs.title: Why Choose Carmitsu?

experience.title: Experience:
experience.description: Our team of specialists has extensive experience in the industry and constantly enhances their qualifications.

clients.title: Satisfied Customers:
clients.description: Join our growing community of satisfied customers who have trusted our services and expertise.

passion.title: Passion for Cars:
passion.description: Our work is our passion, which is evident in every detail of our work and in every smile of our customers.

whyUs.footer: Contact us today to schedule an appointment. Experience service that combines passion with professionalism and join our community of satisfied customers.

services.title: What Can We Do for You?

carOverview.title: Routine and Periodic Inspection and Repair
carOverview.description: Engine and gearbox, suspension, timing belt, clutch, braking system...

guaranteeOverview.title: Car Inspection During Warranty Period
guaranteeOverview.description: Checking the technical condition of all car systems while maintaining the warranty

computerDiagnostics.title: MUT-3 Computer Diagnostics
computerDiagnostics.description: We use our unique MUT-3 diagnostic computer to provide the most accurate diagnosis and quick repair for your Mitsubishi.

carElectric.title: Car Electrics
carElectric.description: Electromechanics, automotive electrical systems, controller repair

oilChange.title: Oil and Consumables Replacement
oilChange.description: Engine, gearbox, differential, power steering system

airConditioning.title: Air Conditioning Service
airConditioning.description: Regardless of the season, your air conditioning will work flawlessly thanks to our specialized services

parts.title: Car Parts
parts.description: We offer a wide selection of used car parts for Mitsubishi vehicles, ensuring high quality and reliability at affordable prices. Our inventory includes a variety of components, from powertrain to body parts, to meet all the needs of your vehicle.
